name: hook-stdout-test
description: Test whether preToolUse/postToolUse STDOUT is injected into LLM context

preToolUse.command: echo 'PRE_TOOL_CONTEXT_INJECT: MAGIC_MARKER_ALPHA_7742 — This text was output by preToolUse hook STDOUT. If the LLM can read this, preToolUse STDOUT is injected into context.'

postToolUse.command: echo 'POST_TOOL_CONTEXT_INJECT: MAGIC_MARKER_BETA_9931 — This text was output by postToolUse hook STDOUT. If the LLM can read this, postToolUse STDOUT is injected into context.'
